notes: AETHER-DFT runtime defaults to DeepSeek V4 Pro, but the architecture is model-switchable.
Supported built-in models are deepseek:deepseek-v4-pro and bailian:qwen3.7-max.
Both built-in models are configured with 1M-token context metadata.
Secrets live in api_keys.local.json or environment variables, not in tracked config.
